calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions Regarding Successor Trustees Power To Sell Trust Real Property & Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Petition
Off Calendar Mar-10-2021 Off Calendar

Petition For Instructions Regarding Successor Trustees Power To Sell Trust Real Property & Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Petition
Off Calendar Aug-26-2020 Continued To Mar-10-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Summer Selleck, Esq., counsel for Marie Eisen, Successor Trustee (appearing by video conference); Gilbert Jay, Esq., counsel for Kennedy Chan and Naomi Chan (appearing by telephone); Jason Louie, Esq., counsel for Kathleen Fleming and Joan Smith, beneficiaries (appearing by telephone).

The Court notes the purpose of today's proceeding: a Petition for Instructions as to the Trustee's power to sell real property in the trust. The Court also notes that the same issue is the subject of civil litigation pending trial in January 2021. In light of the current civil litigation, the Court will stay these proceedings pending resolution at trial or by settlement.

The Court continues this matter to March 10, 2021 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
